rulings.Case Title: CONNAN KING ET AL VS. GREGORY JONES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT GREGORY JONES's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to June 25, 2020. Trial is continued to July 13, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after June 25/July 13, 2020 (respectively), parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on April 10, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. = (501/CFH)
